channel.title: Video on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Video on Pi Stack

item.title: PeerTube: Complete Self-Hosted YouTube Alternative Guide 2026
item.description: If you’re tired of YouTube’s algorithm-driven feed, invasive tracking, unpredictable demonetization, and opaque content policies, it’s time to look at PeerTube — the open-source, federated video platform that lets you host, share, and stream video on your own terms.
